scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run check:constants && npm run test:unit && npm run test:audio-fixtures && npm run test:eval-pipeline
scripts.test:browser-matrix: npm run test:browser-smoke && BROWSER=firefox npm run test:browser-smoke
scripts.lint: node --check app.js && node --check phrase-analysis.js && node --check calibration-wizard.js && node --check bulb-controller.js && node --check necklace-controller.js && node --check hue-bridge.mjs && node --check tools/browser-smoke.mjs
